<!--
TITLE format: "<ID>: <imperative summary>"
  e.g. "S-018: Recognize the real session-limit message"
       "GH-36: Stop re-syncing finished-but-unmerged tickets"
Use the ticket ID (S-NNN for prd stories, GH-<n> for GitHub-issue tickets) so
the PR, the source issue, the adw/<id> branch, and the prd story all line up.
-->

## Problem
<!-- One sentence: what is wrong or missing today. -->

## Proposed Changes
<!--
Lead with the OUTCOME a non-engineer cares about, then the technical how:
"Achieved <X — functional, user-facing outcome> by <Y — technical change>."
Add more bullets if the PR does several distinct things.
-->
Achieved <X outcome> by <Y change>.

## Tradeoffs
<!-- What we chose against, or gave up, to do it this way. -->
-

## Risks & Assumptions
<!-- Succinct: what could break, and what we are assuming holds true. -->
-

## Screenshots
<!-- Optional. Delete this section if there is nothing visual to show. -->
